relatedFeatures.reason: Start with async/await fundamentals, then move to async streams when results should flow item-by-item.
Use using declarations alongside async streams when each item processing step owns disposable resources.
Combine async streams with pattern matching to branch on streamed payload types cleanly.
Apply exception filters to keep async stream error handling specific and readable.

examples.title: From buffered lists to async streams
examples.description: Async streams let callers process records as soon as each result arrives instead of waiting for an entire list to finish loading.

examples.title: Consuming streamed updates with await foreach
examples.description: Use await foreach to process each asynchronous result in order while naturally composing async validation and filtering logic.
